title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 17–18 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo Family, Luffy, Rebecca, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13 as law faces Doflamingo and Fujitora as the Caesar exchange collapses, while Luffy’s group remains tied up in the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Eh... Mummies?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're not Mummies!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: We're the Gladiator prisoners.

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: Rebecca, too... we're made to keep fighting,

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: until we meet our deaths in the ring, as a show for the audience....!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: It's because we've each opposed the Donquixote family at some point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The King has proclaimed that should a Gladia- for reach 1000 wins, he would walk free, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Even the most skilled fighter is bound to croak after 100 or so death- matches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And if we're caught plot- ting to escape, they've promised to shoot every one of us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So we're left with no choice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Up until 10 years ago... before Dofla- Mingo became King...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: These Gladia- Torial fights weren't death- matches at all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Under his rule, this land has seen unparal-eled splendor, but also the worst kind of darkness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I deci- DED that today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I would win this Tourna- went, at any cost.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And obtain the power of the Mera Mera No mi...!! So I can take revenge on Dofla- Mingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Today....!! In order to free us, the forces led by Sol- Dier-san...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Will wage war against Dofla- Mingo...!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: He intends to sacrifice his own life... in order to bring it all down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't you worry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: soldier- San is brave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And he's always by your side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But I'll take charge and do it before he has to!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm sick of always being pro- tested!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: this time, I'm going to protect Sol- Dier-san!!!

summary: Pages 17–18 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
